title: Scene v2.1 — timeline.json shots[] entry (placement identity split from render identity)

composition_id.description: Remotion render source (PascalCase). Present iff engine=remotion. Many scenes may share one.

transition_in.description: Owns exactly the same-lane overlap it needs; validator permits overlap only where an xfade claims it.

props.description: engine=remotion only: values for the composition's propsSchema, passed via --props

takes.description: APPEND-ONLY immutable takes. Each item validates against take.schema.json.

id.description: LEGACY, DERIVED on save: composition_id when engine=remotion else scene_uid. Never read by new code; kept so bake.py and legacy tools run unchanged.

asset.description: LEGACY, DERIVED on save: file of the active take, project-relative. Never hand-edited once takes[] is non-empty.
